title: The Tunes Mari Sings
wikitext:
[]: The Tunes Mari Sings             Quote Post by pratttan » Tue Oct 10, 2023 9:11 pm I've been on the hunt for information on the songs Mari is heard singing to herself, specifically in the Amazon Prime reboots in English. More particularly, I was wondering the song she sings in the beginning of 3.0+1.0, it involved something with a cavalier but I can't find much on Google. This is the Evangelion geek zone, so I figured this would be the place to ask.

[]: Re: The Tunes Mari Sings             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Thu Oct 12, 2023 9:42 am The English dub, as well in other languages, adapted from the Japanese song『真実一路のマーチ』(March of Truth), sung by Kiyoko Suizenji . Lyrics: https://www.uta-net.com/song/46060/

chunks.content:
Article: The Tunes Mari Sings
[]: The Tunes Mari Sings             Quote Post by pratttan » Tue Oct 10, 2023 9:11 pm I've been on the hunt for information on the songs Mari is heard singing to herself, specifically in the Amazon Prime reboots in English. More particularly, I was wondering the song she sings in the beginning of 3.0+1.0, it involved something with a cavalier but I can't find much on Google. This is the Evangelion geek zone, so I figured this would be the place to ask.

[]: Re: The Tunes Mari Sings             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Thu Oct 12, 2023 9:42 am The English dub, as well in other languages, adapted from the Japanese song『真実一路のマーチ』(March of Truth), sung by Kiyoko Suizenji . Lyrics: https://www.uta-net.com/song/46060/
